name: Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana (PMFBY)
summary: Pay just 2% of the sum insured as premium. Government pays the rest. Your crop is covered against natural calamities, pest attacks, and bad weather.
how_to_apply: Visit your nearest bank branch or CSC centre
Ask for PMFBY crop insurance form
Fill in your Aadhaar, land records, and bank details
Pay the 2% premium amount
Keep the receipt — it is your insurance proof
timeline: Apply before crop sowing season ends

name: PM-Kisan Samman Nidhi
summary: Direct income support of ₹6,000 per year provided in 3 equal installments of ₹2,000 each directly to your bank account.
how_to_apply: Visit PM-Kisan portal or nearest CSC
Click on 'New Farmer Registration'
Enter Aadhaar number and fill the form
Upload land ownership documents
Submit and keep the reference number

name: Kisan Credit Card (KCC)
summary: Get short-term agricultural loans up to ₹3 Lakh at a subsidized interest rate of 4% per annum for prompt repayment.
how_to_apply: Visit your bank branch where you have an account
Fill the simplified KCC application form
Submit land records and KYC documents
Bank will process and issue your KCC
benefit_amount: Up to ₹3 Lakh at low interest

name: PM Krishi Sinchai Yojana (PMKSY)
benefit: Subsidy on Drip and Sprinkler systems
summary: Get up to 55% subsidy on installation of micro-irrigation systems like drip and sprinklers to save water and improve yields.
how_to_apply: Register on state agriculture portal
Select equipment and registered vendor
Vendor will upload geo-tagged photos
Subsidy is approved after field inspection

name: Soil Health Card Scheme
summary: Get a comprehensive soil report detailing nutrient deficiencies and crop-specific fertilizer recommendations.
how_to_apply: Contact your local agriculture officer
Provide a soil sample from your farm
Sample is tested in the nearest lab
Collect your Soil Health Card from the office

name: Paramparagat Krishi Vikas Yojana (PKVY)
summary: Promotes cluster-based organic farming with financial assistance for organic inputs, certification, and marketing.
how_to_apply: Form a group of 20 or more farmers
Register the cluster with local agriculture office
Adopt organic farming practices
Receive certification and direct benefit

name: Pradhan Mantri Kusum Yojana
summary: Install standalone solar agriculture pumps with significant government subsidy to eliminate electricity and diesel costs.
how_to_apply: Visit state renewable energy portal
Submit application with land details
Deposit your share (10-40%)
Pump is installed by authorized vendor
